nice_have_skills: Ability to quickly learn new frameworks
education_requirements: Pursuing a BS or MS in Computer Science or related technical field
key_responsibilities: Design and build highly reliable and resilient products and features
Work closely with cross functional product and customer-facing teams to understand requirements and ship thoughtful solutions
Write high-quality, extensible, and maintainable code
Design and build scalable frontend applications and components
Design and build APIs to drive existing and new features for a web-based application
relevant_data: Zip is a business/productivity software company with 700 employees, valued at $2.2 billion as of October 2024.
Zip's AI platform has saved customers over $6 billion and processed hundreds of billions in spend.

Employees rate Zip as having a collaborative and supportive work environment with good pay, though some reviews mention an under-average culture rating. 70% of employees would recommend working at Zip.
Zip encourages diverse candidates to apply and is committed to building an inclusive workspace.
